Key.description: Abbreviation [Key] of the team (e.g. LAC; PHI; NE; IND; etc.)

TeamID.description: The unique ID of the team

PlayerID.description: The auto-generated unique ID of the Team, that avoids collisions with PlayerIDs.  This is useful when combining players and fantasy defenses to create fantasy teams.

City.description: The city/location of the team (e.g. Minnesota; Philadelphia; New England; Indianapolis; etc.)

Name.description: The mascot of the team (e.g. Chargers, Eagles, Patriots, Colts, etc.)

Conference.description: The conference of the team (e.g. AFC or NFC)

Division.description: The division of the team (e.g. East, North, South, West)

FullName.description: The full name of the team (e.g. New England Patriots)

StadiumID.description: The unique ID of the team's current home stadium

ByeWeek.description: The bye week of the team in the upcoming or current regular season

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

HeadCoach.description: The current head coach of the team

PrimaryColor.description: The team's first color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

SecondaryColor.description: The team's second color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

TertiaryColor.description: The team's third color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

QuaternaryColor.description: The team's fourth color. (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

WikipediaLogoURL.description: The link to the team's logo hosted on Wikipedia (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

WikipediaWordMarkURL.description: The link to the team's wordmark logo hosted on Wikipedia (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

OffensiveCoordinator.description: The current offensive coordinator of the team. Note: field will be NULL if team doesn't have an OFF coordinator

DefensiveCoordinator.description: The current defensive coordinator of the team. Note: field will be NULL if team doesn't have an DEFF coordinator

SpecialTeamsCoach.description: The current special teams coordinator of the team. Note: field will be NULL if team doesn't have an ST coordinator

OffensiveScheme.description: The offensive scheme this team runs (PRO, 2TE, 3WR).  This is decided at our discretion.

DefensiveScheme.description: The current defensive scheme this team runs (3-4, 4-3)
